description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial with silver-toned handsStrap style: Steel-toned bracelet style strap secured with a butterfly clasp Features: A screw to reset time, a date aperture, three chronograph facesWater resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature Citizen caseWarranty: 1 year international warranty
